---
title: "Caching"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: Cache
```

GeoDataAccess.jl caches API responses to disk via
[Scratch.jl](https://github.com/JuliaPackaging/Scratch.jl).  Caching is enabled by default —
repeated requests for the same data are served from disk without hitting the network.

## Status

```{julia}
Cache.ENABLED[]
```

## Enable / Disable

```julia
# Disable caching (all requests go to the network)
Cache.enable!(false)

# Re-enable caching
Cache.enable!(true)
```

## Inspecting the Cache

```julia
# List all cached files
Cache.list()
```

## Clearing the Cache

```julia
# Clear everything
Cache.clear!()
```

Cache files are stored in a Scratch.jl-managed directory and are automatically cleaned up
when the package is removed or Julia's scratchspace is garbage-collected.
